title: The Worst Generation Faces the Emperors
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Killer, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Big deal. It's made of junk anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: I've never dissected a dragon before,

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 18 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
